3157770.name: Divine Omen | Chapter 1
3157770.description:
Avan jolted awake from the same nightmare he'd experienced for nights on end. It was something he'd learned to live with - something that lingered over him since he was just a boy...but last night was different. A distant yet familiar voice called to him through an endless, empty expanse. Visions of a small body wearing blue flooded his vision. His right palm seared from a burn that had long since healed. The nightmares had only grown more vivid with time. More sinister. More real.

The young man held his aching hand close as he wandered to the watchtower he'd been summoned to. A little girl was found dead not far from the city. Though her clothes stained with black blood were alarming in their own right, it was their blue hue that captured Avan's intrigue. Could his dreams be tied to the truth of what happened?

Reports of disappearances climbed high on the Guard Captain's desk while the pain in Avan's head grew. In a bid to ease his guilty conscience, Avan found himself invested in uncovering the truth. The night before he was set to depart for the scene of the crime, two strange figures bearing an eerie message visited his dreams.

"Executioner...your first and final trial waits for you there...at the temple."

It didn't mean anything. At least not then.

In Divine Omen, even the most innocuous choices can shape the fates of your companions. The messages in Avan's dreams serve as your guide. Listen carefully.

  • Choice driven narrative featuring horror, fantasy, and LGBTQ+ themes

  • Complex, lively characters that respond to your actions

  • Simple point-and-click gameplay suitable for all skill levels

  • 41,342 word count in Chapter 1 alone!

  • Journal feature provides insight into the world of Divine Omen

  • An entirely original soundtrack featuring 8 compositions

  • Over 600 hand drawn sprites, environments, and animations

  • Collectables and gallery bonus content to unlock

  • Episodic release - more to look forward to later!

*Divine Omen contains themes that aren't suitable for all players.

*The game available on this page contains the first of four planned chapters of Divine Omen. Upon their release, Chapters 2-4 will be available on a separate project page.
